aria.configuration.whisperPort: Port for Faster Whisper STT server
aria.configuration.silenceTimeoutMs: Milliseconds of silence before processing audio
aria.configuration.enableMicrophone: Enable microphone input for voice chat
aria.configuration.ttsSpeed: Speech speed multiplier for Aria's voice (0.5-3.0)
aria.configuration.stage1Days: Number of days for Stage 1 (The Assistant)
aria.configuration.stage2Days: Number of days for Stage 2 (Too Close)
aria.configuration.enableTextChat: Enable text chat responses from Aria
aria.configuration.textChatColor: Text color for Aria's chat messages (hex)
